claimed_outcomes.text: Returns confirmation number, account number, selected start date, deposit amount, next owner, and a nullable blocker from the visible terminal page.

completion_criteria.text: Return the safe structured result from the terminal confirmation page or the manual-service blocker.

submit_commercial_water_request.declared_goal: Submit the observed commercial water service form and safely return confirmation details or an explicit blocker.

exploration_observations.text: Observed the request form and enabled Submit Request button.

terminal_verifier_expectations.text: The runtime output contains every requested field, with blocker null only when visible confirmation data is returned.

_copilot_yaml:
title: Start Citrus County Commercial Water Service
summary: Submit a reusable commercial water service request and return its confirmation
  details.
description: Uses configurable business, contact, service address, and start date
  inputs.
proxy_location: NONE
webhook_callback_url: ''
persist_browser_session: false
pin_saved_session_ip: false
browser_profile_id: null
browser_profile_key: null
model: null
max_screenshot_scrolls: null
max_elapsed_time_minutes: null
totp_verification_url: null
extra_http_headers: {}
run_with: agent
cache_key: default
ai_fallback: true
enable_self_healing: false
workflow_definition:
  version: 2
  parameters:
  - parameter_type: workflow
    key: business_name
    workflow_parameter_type: string
    description: Business or company name
  - parameter_type: workflow
    key: contact_email
    workflow_parameter_type: string
    description: Contact email for the request
  - parameter_type: workflow
    key: service_address
    workflow_parameter_type: string
    description: Full commercial service address
  - parameter_type: workflow
    key: desired_start_date
    workflow_parameter_type: string
    description: Requested service start date in YYYY-MM-DD format
  blocks:
  - block_type: code
    label: submit_commercial_water_request
    next_block_label: null
    code: "# Workflow input bindings: {{ parameters.business_name }}, {{ parameters.contact_email\
      \ }}, {{ parameters.service_address }}, {{ parameters.desired_start_date }}\n\
      await page.goto(\"http://localhost:8900/utility_services/citrus_water/\")\n\
      await page.wait_for_load_state(\"domcontentloaded\")\nawait page.locator(\"\
      button[data-action=\\\"citrusForm\\\"]\").click()\nawait page.wait_for_load_state(\"\
      domcontentloaded\")\nawait page.locator(\"#company\").wait_for(state=\"visible\"\
      )\nawait page.locator(\"#company\").fill(str(business_name).strip())\nawait\
      \ page.locator(\"#email\").fill(str(contact_email).strip())\nawait page.locator(\"\
      #serviceAddress\").fill(str(service_address).strip())\nawait page.locator(\"\
      #startDate\").fill(str(desired_start_date).strip())\nsubmit_button = page.get_by_role(\"\
      button\", name=\"Submit Request\", exact=True)\nawait submit_button.wait_for(state=\"\
      visible\")\nif not await submit_button.is_enabled():\n    body_text = await\
      \ page.locator(\"body\").inner_text()\n    return {\"output\": {\"confirmation_number\"\
      : None, \"account_number\": None, \"selected_start_date\": None, \"deposit_amount\"\
      : None, \"next_owner\": None, \"blocker\": \"The online request form is not\
      \ reviewable or submit-enabled.\", \"evidence_text\": body_text[:4000]}}\nawait\
      \ submit_button.click()\nawait page.wait_for_timeout(700)\nbody_text = await\
      \ page.locator(\"body\").inner_text()\nlines = [line.strip() for line in body_text.splitlines()\
      \ if line.strip()]\ndef value_after(labels):\n    for index, line in enumerate(lines):\n\
      \        low = line.lower()\n        for label in labels:\n            if label\
      \ in low:\n                if \":\" in line:\n                    value = line.split(\"\
      :\", 1)[1].strip()\n                    if value:\n                        return\
      \ value\n                if index + 1 < len(lines):\n                    return\
      \ lines[index + 1]\n    return None\nconfirmation_number = value_after([\"confirmation\
      \ number\", \"confirmation #\"])\naccount_number = value_after([\"account number\"\
      , \"account #\"])\nselected_start_date = value_after([\"selected start date\"\
      , \"requested start date\", \"start date\"])\ndeposit_amount = value_after([\"\
      deposit amount\", \"deposit\"])\nnext_owner = value_after([\"next owner\", \"\
      assigned to\", \"owner\"])\nlower_text = body_text.lower()\nmanual_only = (\"\
      manual\" in lower_text or \"email us\" in lower_text) and confirmation_number\
      \ is None\nmissing_confirmation = confirmation_number is None and not manual_only\n\
      blocker = \"The portal exposes an email/manual-service path instead of an online\
      \ confirmation.\" if manual_only else (\"The submitted page did not expose a\
      \ confirmation number.\" if missing_confirmation else None)\nreturn {\"output\"\
      : {\"confirmation_number\": confirmation_number, \"account_number\": account_number,\
      \ \"selected_start_date\": selected_start_date, \"deposit_amount\": deposit_amount,\
      \ \"next_owner\": next_owner, \"blocker\": blocker, \"evidence_text\": body_text[:6000]}}\n"
    parameter_keys:
    - business_name
    - contact_email
    - desired_start_date
    - service_address
    extraction_schema: '{"type":"object","properties":{"output":{"type":"object","properties":{"confirmation_number":{"type":["string","null"]},"account_number":{"type":["string","null"]},"selected_start_date":{"type":["string","null"]},"deposit_amount":{"type":["string","null"]},"next_owner":{"type":["string","null"]},"blocker":{"type":["string","null"]},"evidence_text":{"type":"string"}},"required":["confirmation_number","account_number","selected_start_date","deposit_amount","next_owner","blocker","evidence_text"]}},"required":["output"]}'
    prompt: Submit the observed commercial water service form and safely return confirmation
      details or an explicit blocker.
is_saved_task: false
status: published
run_sequentially: false
sequential_key: null
description: Uses configurable business, contact, service address, and start date inputs.
title: Start Citrus County Commercial Water Service

blocks.code:
# Workflow input bindings: {{ parameters.business_name }}, {{ parameters.contact_email }}, {{ parameters.service_address }}, {{ parameters.desired_start_date }}
await page.goto("http://localhost:8900/utility_services/citrus_water/")
await page.wait_for_load_state("domcontentloaded")
await page.locator("button[data-action=\"citrusForm\"]").click()
await page.wait_for_load_state("domcontentloaded")
await page.locator("#company").wait_for(state="visible")
await page.locator("#company").fill(str(business_name).strip())
await page.locator("#email").fill(str(contact_email).strip())
await page.locator("#serviceAddress").fill(str(service_address).strip())
await page.locator("#startDate").fill(str(desired_start_date).strip())
submit_button = page.get_by_role("button", name="Submit Request", exact=True)
await submit_button.wait_for(state="visible")
if not await submit_button.is_enabled():
    body_text = await page.locator("body").inner_text()
    return {"output": {"confirmation_number": None, "account_number": None, "selected_start_date": None, "deposit_amount": None, "next_owner": None, "blocker": "The online request form is not reviewable or submit-enabled.", "evidence_text": body_text[:4000]}}
await submit_button.click()
await page.wait_for_timeout(700)
body_text = await page.locator("body").inner_text()
lines = [line.strip() for line in body_text.splitlines() if line.strip()]
def value_after(labels):
    for index, line in enumerate(lines):
        low = line.lower()
        for label in labels:
            if label in low:
                if ":" in line:
                    value = line.split(":", 1)[1].strip()
                    if value:
                        return value
                if index + 1 < len(lines):
                    return lines[index + 1]
    return None
confirmation_number = value_after(["confirmation number", "confirmation #"])
account_number = value_after(["account number", "account #"])
selected_start_date = value_after(["selected start date", "requested start date", "start date"])
deposit_amount = value_after(["deposit amount", "deposit"])
next_owner = value_after(["next owner", "assigned to", "owner"])
lower_text = body_text.lower()
manual_only = ("manual" in lower_text or "email us" in lower_text) and confirmation_number is None
missing_confirmation = confirmation_number is None and not manual_only
blocker = "The portal exposes an email/manual-service path instead of an online confirmation." if manual_only else ("The submitted page did not expose a confirmation number." if missing_confirmation else None)
return {"output": {"confirmation_number": confirmation_number, "account_number": account_number, "selected_start_date": selected_start_date, "deposit_amount": deposit_amount, "next_owner": next_owner, "blocker": blocker, "evidence_text": body_text[:6000]}}
blocks.label: submit_commercial_water_request

parameters.description: Requested service start date in YYYY-MM-DD format

blocks.prompt: Submit the observed commercial water service form and safely return confirmation details or an explicit blocker.

parameters.description: Requested service start date in YYYY-MM-DD format
